title: Review: relay round 17
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — Three P0 correctness bugs exist simultaneously (GROUP_SEND wrong error, enqueue TOCTOU flood cap bypass, GROUP_SEND delivers to departed members); plus a payment activation bug that shortchanges subscribers when SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS changes. These affect correctness of the core payment and messaging flows.
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: cannot run cargo test during review to exercise migration paths; cannot observe SQLite DEFERRED vs IMMEDIATE transaction isolation behavior empirically; cannot trace payment_watcher logic against a live lightwalletd. Would raise confidence if: integration test for concurrent enqueue() past cap limit; test for GROUP_SEND to departed member; test for activate_subscription with changed SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS.
